reference: I was recently diagnosed with a urinary tract infection, and they also cultured it. I was prescribed ciprofloxacin, and now, ten days later, the urgency to urinate and the discomfort are gone, but I continue to feel sore in the lower abdomen. I went in two days ago and took another test, which showed no infection, but my abdomen still hurts, and I just feel kind of unwell.
text: I was recently diagnosed with a urinary tract infection, and they also cultured it. I was prescribed ciprofloxacin, and now ten days later, the urgency to urinate and the discomfort are gone. But I continue to feel sore in the lower abdomen. I went in two days ago and took another test, which showed no infection, but my abdomen still hurts, and I just feel kind of unwell.
